calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-27-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jul-23-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Douglas Holloway, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Bank of the West.
John Thomas, Special Assets Officer for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Billy A. Hightower.
Default was entered against defendant Billy A. Hightower on June 4, 2009.
Dismissal without prejudice as to defendants Heavy Equipment Rental & Sales, LLC and Billy Ray Hightower, was filed on June 4, 2009
Doe defendants were dismissed on June 4, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Bank of the West, and against the Defaulted Defendant Billy A. Hightower as follows:

Damages/Principal - $106,394.30.
Prejudgment Interest - $4,312.72.
Attorney's Fees - $2,500.00.
Costs - $390.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $113,597.02.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-18-2009 Off Calendar
